brand: Say Biblia ed Saksakey a Liking
docTitle: Say Biblia Diad Mapa · Say Biblia ed Saksakey a Liking
metaDesc: Tumboken so linya na panaon na Daan a Sipanan, say bilay nen Jesus, tan saray biahe nen Pablo diad tuan mapa — agawa so Biblia ed tuan saray pasen.

s.kicker: Say Biblia ed Saksakey a Liking · Saray Mapa
s.title: Say Biblia Diad Mapa
s.verse: “Nen impaamta mid sikayoy nipaakar ed pakayari tan say ipawil na Katawan tayon Jesu-Cristo, ag mi inagamil iray andi-kakanaan a tongtong na saray totoo. Naimatunan miy atagey a kipapasen to” (2 Pedro 1:16)
s.purpose: Say Biblia et aliwan istoryan-tila. Sakey yan rekord na saray totoon nanakar ed tuan saray pasen, petsa, tan ngaran. Tumboken iray dalan da diad sakey a mapa, unung ed pakasumpal na panaon — pindut moy sakey a punto, odino pindut moy ▶ pian tumboken itan a sakey-sakey.
s.ot_kick: ① Daan a Sipanan — diad interon panaon
s.ot_h: Manlapud pamalsa anggad isempet ed Jerusalem
s.ot_lead: Aliwan saksakey a biahe noagta say agus na mahistorya-redentibo manlapud pamalsa: pamalsa tan inkapelag → delap tan Babel → sakey a tawag (Abraham) → say insipan a dalin → Exodo → kalawakan → sakop → panarian → inkabiang → inkapriso → isempet.
s.je_kick: ② Balon Sipanan — say bilay nen Jesus
s.je_lead: Tumboken so bilay nen Jesus unung ed pangibaga na saray Ebanghelyo, unung ed pakasumpal — manlapud inkianak to ed Betlehem, diad impanbinyag tan kimey to ed Galilea, ombabaliw ed Samaria, anggad krus, kioli, tan inkayatagey to ed Jerusalem.
s.pa_kick: ③ Balon Sipanan — saray biahe nen Pablo
s.pa_h: Manlapud Antioquia anggad saray sampot na dalin — Roma
s.pa_lead: Manlapud Pentecostes ed Jerusalem, no panoy inkayat na maung a balita ed paway na Judea — diad panamegley na Asia Minor tan Europa anggad puso na empiryo. Mamili kay sakey ed limaran biahe (unaan·komadua·komatlo + say biahe ya onlad Roma + kayari inkibulos) tan tumboken iray agawa ed Saray Gawgawa kaiba ray sulat ya insulat diad dalan.
s.foot: Saray panlapuan · Saray pasen et ontumbok ed teksto na Biblia tan say estandarte a heograpiya na Biblia (kaiba ray modernon ngaran no makatulong). Saray gilig na dayat, saray ilog, tan saray dayat-dayatan et nanlapud open a heograpikon datos (Natural Earth), ya pinasimple.
s.contact: Saray tepet · komento — Mangipawit na email

eden.name: Eden (Pamalsa · Inkapelag)
eden.note: Diad sakey a mundon apalsan “maung a tuloy,” linmoob so kasalanan tan aputot toy pisanaan na Dios tan katoowan.
events: Pamalsa ed anemiran agew — “maung a tuloy”
Say too apalsa ed laraway Dios
Say inkapelag, tan inkipapaway ed Eden
Say unaan a sipan na maung a balita — “temeken na anak na bii so olo na uleg”

noah.name: Ararat (say Delap)
noah.today: Palandey Ararat, bukig na Turkia natan
noah.note: Uukomen na Dios so mundon napno na kasalanan, balet pansiansiaen toy bilay diad panamegley na saksakey a pamilya.
events: Sakey a mundon napno na kaugsan
Say delap, tan say biong nen Noe
Say sipanan na bullalong — “anggapo lay delap a manderal lamet”

babel.name: Tori na Babel
babel.note: Sumpad inkapaatagey a manaanap ed tawen, iwarak na Dios so salita ra tan saray totoo ed interon dalin.
events: “Mangipaalagey itayoy syudad tan tori… tan manggaway ngaran tayo”
Ginulo na Dios so salita ra
Niwarak iray totoo ed interon dalin (Sinar — say Babilonia ed saginonor)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Say istorya na kilalaban ed Biblia et onggapo ed pantawag ed saksakey a laki.
events: Tinawag na Dios si Abram a paway ed Ur na saray Caldeo
“Pagmaliwen ta kan sakey a baleg a bansa… nabindisionan so amin a totoo diad panamegley mo”
Diad pananisia tinaynan toy sarili ton dalin

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: Diad dalan, oonuren toy tawag ya onlad insipan a dalin.
events: Nanayam so pamilya nen Tera ed Haran
Inatey si Tera
Nen 75 lay taon to, tinmaynan si Abram ya onlad Canaan

shechem.name: Sikem · Canaan
shechem.note: Diad insipan a dalin, ahormaan so sakey a pamilya tan niyakar so sipanan ed saray onsublay a kailalakan.
events: Inloob ed Canaan, unaan ya altar — “iter kod saray ilalak mo yan dalin”
Say sipanan (Gen 15) · Isaac · Jacob
Say samploran duaran anak nen Jacob — lamot na samploran duaran tribu

egypt.name: Egipto (Gosen)
egypt.note: Say sakey a pamilya nagmaliw a baleg a bansa — insan sakey a bansa na saray aripen.
events: Si Jose, ya inlako, inmatagey a nanuley ed Egipto
Say interon pamilya nen Jacob linmasur pian makapaliktar ed eras
Say onababaleg a bansa na Israel et ginawan aripen

sinai.name: Palandey Sinai
sinai.note: Say sentral a kilalaban ed Daan a Sipanan — saray aripen nagmaliw a dilin baley na Dios.
events: Say samploran salot tan say kordiron Paskua
Abelsay so Ambalangan Dayat tan binmaliw ira
Say Samploran Ganggan, say Ganggan, say tabernakulo, tan saray bagat

kadesh.name: Kades (kalawakan)
kadesh.note: Lapud ag-panisia, abalang na sakey a henerasyon so dalin — balet siansian akiib so Dios ed sikara.
events: Samploran duaran espiya — balet ag mananisia iray totoo
38 a taon ed kalawakan — manna, lurem, tan apoy
Diad patar na Moab, say sankaonuran a pulong nen Moises (Deuteronomio)

jericho.name: Jerico
jericho.note: Diad kaonuran, inloob tan asakop day insipan a dalin.
events: Abelsay so Jordan tan binmaliw iray totoo
Apelag iray padir na Jerico
Say pananakop ed Canaan tan say inkiapag na dalin

shiloh.name: Silo (Saray Huis)
shiloh.note: Lapud anggapoy ari, ginawa na balang sakey so labay to — nakaukolan so tuan ari.
events: Impaalagey so tabernakulo ed Silo
Say inuulit ya panagkuli na kasalanan–panamaolop–kilalaban (Debora, Gideon, Samson)
Rut — katooran diad ambilonget iran agew, ed boleg nen David

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem · Nankakasakey a Panarian
jerusalem.note: Say balitong a panaon na Israel — tan say sipan na andi-anggaan ya ari.
events: Si Saul ya unaan ya ari, insan si David tan si Goliat
Say sipanan ed si David — “mansiansia lawas so trono mo” (2 Samuel 7)
Impaalagey nen Solomon so templo ed Jerusalem

samaria.name: Samaria · Abiang a Panarian
samaria.note: Nabiang so panarian tan onleleksab legan ya onaakis iray propita.
events: Kayari nen Solomon, abiang ed Juda tan Israel
Inuulit-ulit ya idolatriya
Onaakis si Elias, Isaias, Jeremias na “ompawil kayo” — tan ipasakbay day Mesias

nineveh.name: Ninive (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Lapud ag da inkaskaso so amin a pasakbay, say amianen so unaan a napelag.
events: Ninive, say kapitolyo na Asiria
Say amianen a panarian apelag ed Asiria (722 antis na Cristo)
Imbaki si Jonas ed Ninive

babylon.name: Babilonia
babylon.note: Say sankabilongetan a labi — balet mansiansia so sipan na kipawil.
events: Napelag so Jerusalem, apoolan so templo (586 antis na Cristo)
Naawit so Juda ed Babilonia
Daniel tan Ezekiel — pananisia tan saray pasingawey ed inkapriso

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Anggan diad puso na sakey a paganon empiryo, aasikasoen na Dios so baley to.
events: Tinalo na Persia so Babilonia
Inlaban nen Ester iray Judio ed inkaderal
Nampikasi si Nehemias ed arap na ari tan imbaki

return.name: Isempet ed Jerusalem
return.note: Onsempet ira tan ipaalagey da lamet — balet anggapo niy ari a sinmabi. Manaalagar iray Mesias.
events: Taloran daluyon na isempet unung ed ganggan nen Ciro (Zerubabel 538 · Esdras 458 · Nehemias 444)
Impaalagey lamet so templo tan inyoli iray padir na Jerusalem
Malaquias — sinampotan toy Daan a Sipanan: “Paonlaen koy ibabakik”

bethlehem.name: Betlehem
bethlehem.note: Say insipan a Mesias sinmabi ed baley nen David — say Salita a nagmaliw a too.
events: Inyanak ed Betlehem, say baley nen David
Impakabat na saray anghel so balita ed saray managpastol
Sinmabi iray mago pian mandayew

nazareth.name: Nazaret
nazareth.note: Say Dios binmaleg bilang too diad sakey a kaslakan a baley.
events: Binmaleg ed abung na sakey a karpintero
Nen labindua, mantetepet tan oneebat ed templo
Nen saginonor, sikatoy impulisay ed sinagoga na baley to

jordan.name: Ilog Jordan
jordan.note: Onggapo so kimey to ed publiko — pineknekan na tawen a sikato so Anak.
events: Binyagan nen Juan
Say Ispiritu linmasur a singa malapati — “Saya so inararok ya Anak”
Tinalo toy taloran tukso nen Satanas ed kalawakan

cana.name: Cana
cana.note: Diad unaan a tanda to impanengneng toy kagalangan to.
events: Sakey a bisita ed kasal
Say danum apagmaliw a alak — say unaan a tanda to
Anisia ed sikato iray disipulo to

sychar.name: Sicar (Samaria)
sychar.note: Say dalan na inmunan kimey — diad panamegley na Jerusalem tan anggad nabalbalaw a Samaria.
events: Linisan toy templo ed Jerusalem
Diad labi, si Nicodemo — “Nakaukolan a niyanak kayo lamet”
Mabilay a danum parad sakey a biin Samaritana

capernaum.name: Capernaum
capernaum.today: say gilig na dayat na Galilea natan
capernaum.note: Say sentro na kimey ed Galilea — say pantawag, panagbangat, tan panusumpa et amin dia nantatagbo.
events: Tinawag toy saray sumisigay tan diad saya nanayam
Say Pulong ed Palandey — “Maliket iray mairap ed espiritu”
Saray parabolo na panarian — tan say ombabaleg a panusumpa

galilee.name: Dayat na Galilea
galilee.note: Diad pakayari to ed kalikasan impanengneng to no siopa a talaga.
events: “Mareen ka!” — pinareen toy bagyo
Pinakan toy 5,000 diad limaran tinapay tan duaran sira
Nanakar ed tapew na danum

caesarea_p.name: Cesarea Filipos
caesarea_p.note: Natalusan na saray disipulo a sikato so Cristo, tan nilukasan so dalan na krus.
events: Say impangipatua nen Pedro — “Sika so Cristo, say Anak na mabilay a Dios”
Unaan ton impasakbay so patey tan kioli to
Nanuman so itsura to diad kagalangan ed palandey

jericho.name: Jerico
jericho.note: Diad dalan ya onlad Jerusalem, aanapen toy abalang.
events: Ginawa ton makanengneng so bulag a Bartimeo
Tinawag toy managsingil na buis a Zaqueo
“Say Anak na Too linma pian anapen tan ilaban to ramay abalang”

bethany.name: Betania
bethany.note: Impanengneng toy pakayari to ed patey diad asingger lay sankaonuran a simba to.
events: Pinaoli toy Lazaro ed lubok — “Siak so kioli tan say bilay”
Linanaan nen Maria parad ponpon to
Lapud sayan tanda binmiskeg so plano a mamatey ed sikato

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Say sankatageyan a punto ya tuturoen na interon Biblia — krus, kioli, inkayatagey.
events: Say madayew ya iloob; binaliktad to lamet iray lamisaan ed templo
Diad Sankaonuran a Pangan inurasan toy sali na saray disipulo
Inatey ed krus
Inmoli ed komatlon agew, insan inmatagey ed tawen

antioch.name: Antioquia
antioch.note: Say mangibaki ya iglesia ya angigapoan tan sempetan na misyon ed saray Hentil.
events: Legan na pikakasi, imbiig na Ispiritu si Bernabe tan Saulo
Say iglesia ya ditan unaan a tinawag a “Cristiano” iray mananisia
Say pangigapoan na unaan, komadua, tan komatlon biahe

seleucia.name: Seleucia
seleucia.note: Say duongan na Antioquia — linmayag ira ya onlad Chipre.

salamis.name: Salamina (Chipre)
salamis.note: Unaan a nampundoan ed Chipre — nampupulong ed saray sinagoga.

paphos.name: Pafos
paphos.note: Nipanengneng so pakayari sumpad saramay onsusumpa ed maung a balita.
events: Abulag so managsalamangka a Elimas
Anisia so gobernador a Sergio Paulo
Manlapud dia, si “Pablo” lay nanguna

perga.name: Perge
perga.note: Sakey a duongan ed Pamfilia — dia tinmaynan tan pinmawil si Juan Marcos.

pantioch.name: Antioquia na Pisidia
pantioch.note: Nilukasan so maung a balita ya onlad saray Hentil.
events: Sakey ya andukey a pulong nipaakar ed istorya na kilalaban ed sinagoga
Dakel a Hentil so nanliket tan inawat day salita
Pinapaway ira lapud panusumpa

iconium.name: Iconio
iconium.note: Dakel so anisia, balet say panamasegsegang so amaalis ed sikara.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Nidayew a singa dios, insan binato.
events: Pinaabig toy sakey a lakin pilay nanlapud inkianak to
Say ulop labay dan bagatan ira bilang dios
Binato tan tinaynan a singa inatey, balet binmangon

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Dakel a disipulo so nagawa; pinmawil ira ed dinalan da pian pabiskegen iray iglesia.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Say pasen na panguman ya ditan unaan ya inmarap ed Europa so maung a balita.
events: Sakey a pasingawey na sakey a laki na Macedonia
“Ondago ka dia ed Macedonia tan tulongan mo kami”
Tampol iran binmaliw ed Europa

philippi.name: Filipos
philippi.note: Say unaan ya iglesia ed Europa — analo so maung a balita anggan diad loob na priso.
events: Si Lidia, sakey a manlalako na purpuran abel, anisia
Say sakey ya aripen a bii a managhula so nibulos
Saray himno ed pegley-labi, sakey a yegyeg na dalin, nilaban so sankaabungan na guardia na priso

thess.name: Tesalonica
thess.note: Payegyegen na salita so syudad tan onsager so panusumpa.
events: Nankatunungan ed sinagoga diad taloran Sabado
“Sarayan totoo ya angibaliktad ed interon mundo”
Tinmakas ira diad labi

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Saramay “marlang” a totoon mismon inusisa day salita.
events: Inawat day salita a masimoon
Inagew-agew a sinukimat day Masanton Sulat pian anengneng no tua
Dakel so anisia

athens.name: Atenas
athens.note: Diad syudad na saray pilosopo impulong toy “ag-kabat a dios.”
events: Agonigon ed sakey a syudad a napno na saray idolo
Diad Areopago impulong toy Manamalsa tan say kioli
Nielek-elekan, balet pigara so anisia

corinth.name: Corinto
corinth.note: Nanayam na sakey taon tan kapaldua, nantanem na iglesia ed sakey a syudad na kaugsan.
events: Nanggaway tolda kaiba nen Aquila tan Priscila
“Ag ka natatakot… ta kaiba ta ka”
Dakel a taga-Corinto so anisia tan abinyagan

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Puso na komatlon biahe — nikayat so salita ed interon Asia.
events: Inagew-agew a panagbangat na duaran taon ed pasen na panagbangat nen Tirano
Apoolan iray libro na salamangka; makapanyari iran gawa
Say platero a Demetrio so angigapoy gulo

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Sakey a maakis a panagsian ed saray mamatatken na iglesia ed Efeso.
events: “Asikasoen yoy iglesia ya sinaliw to ed dili ton dala”
Nannangis iray mamatatken, ta amta dan ag da la sikato nanengneng lamet

caesarea.name: Cesarea
caesarea.today: say gilig na dayat na Israel natan
caesarea.note: Diad loob na duaran taon indepensa toy maung a balita ed arap na saray gobernador tan sakey ya ari.
events: Saray paukom ed arap na saray gobernador a Felix tan Festo
Say depensa to ed arap nen Arin Agripa
“Onapela ak ed Cesar” — onla ed Roma

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Dinakep diad templo, onggapo so dalan to bilang priso.
events: Dinakep na ulop ed templo
Indepensa toy sarili to ed arap na konseho
Bilang mibabaley na Roma, imbaki ya abantayan ya onlad Cesarea

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Nanalis irad sakey a barko na Alejandria ya onlad Roma.

fairhaven.name: Mararakep a Duongan (Creta)
fairhaven.note: Say pasakbay nen Pablo ya itunda so panaglayag et ag da dinengel.

crete.name: Creta
crete.note: Kayari inkibulos to, say isla ya ditan tinaynan toy Tito pian iyareglo iray iglesia.
events: Tinaynan toy Tito pian manuro na mamatatken ed kada baley
Kinerew toy andiay-pakabalawan tan matoor iran lider
Insulat toy sulat ed si Tito

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Anggaman say bagyo tan inkalner na barko, mansiansia so sipan na Dios.
events: Say bagyo a nanlapud amianen-bukig a dagem so amaderal ed barko, balet amin ya 276 so akaliktar
Akaketket na masamal ya uleg, balet ag asakitan
Pinaabig toy saray mansasakit ed isla

syracuse.name: Siracusa
syracuse.note: Nampundo ira na taloran agew ed Sicilia.

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Dinmapo irad Italia tan sinabat ira na saray kaparan mananisia.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Saray Gawgawa 28 · Saray Sulat ed Priso · 2 Timoteo
rome.note: Diad kaonuran sinmabi so maung a balita ed puso na empiryo — aliwan anggaan noagta sakey a gapo.
events: Duaran taon ya akapriso ed abung, makpel ya impupulong toy panarian
Manlapud dia insulat to ray Sulat ed Priso (Taga-Efeso·Taga Filipos·Colosas·Filemon)
Nen saginonor apriso lamet, insulat toy 2 Timoteo tan inatey bilang martir — “Akilaban ak ed maung a laban, sinumpal koy batik”
